creator: klm@uidzero.org
text:
I can, but first I need to know where the new options framework is
documented. I assume you are you referring to section 5.12.2 in the
handbook. Is that correct, and if so, is the documentation provided
there current?

  http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-options.html
